zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Rose Eglesfield於1616年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Emanuel Eglesfield24歲，母親Susan Gray24歲。她於1646年1月31日與Samuel Henry Adams在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托享年43歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Rose Eglesfield于1616年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Emanuel Eglesfield24岁，母亲Susan Gray24岁。她于1646年1月31日与Samuel Henry Adams在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托享年43岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可哈爾斯托菲利普斯 史崔特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Eglesfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave in the memorial list

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Rose Eglesfield was born in 1616, in London, England, her father, Emanuel Eglesfield, was 24 and her mother, Susan Gray, was 24. She married Samuel Henry Adams on 31 January 1646, in Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1659, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 43, and was buried in Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Rose Eglesfield est née en 1616, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Emanuel Eglesfield, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Susan Gray, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Henry Adams le 31 janvier 1646, à Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1659, à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Januar 1646 in Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Samuel Henry Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1659 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Rose Eglesfield è nata il nel 1616 nel London, England, sua padre, Emanuel Eglesfield, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Susan Gray, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Henry Adams il 31 gennaio 1646, nel Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1659, nel Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Rose Eglesfieldが1616年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Emanuel Eglesfieldは24歳，母Susan Grayは24歳であった。1646年1月31日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクでSamuel Henry Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1659年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンで43歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチャーレストウンフィリップス ストレエト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Rose Eglesfield(이)가 1616년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Emanuel Eglesfield(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susan Gray(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1646년 1월 31일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크에서 Samuel Henry Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 찰레스타운 필립스 스트릿 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Rose Eglesfield nasceu em 1616, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Emanuel Eglesfield, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Susan Gray, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Henry Adams em 31 de janeiro de 1646, em Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1659, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Phipps Street Cemetery, Charlestown, Mas: филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Rose Eglesfield родилась в 1616 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Emanuel Eglesfield было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Susan Gray, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Henry Adams 31 января 1646 г. в местности суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1659 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности филлипс стрит буринг гроунд, чарльстоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Rose Eglesfield nació en 1616, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Emanuel Eglesfield, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Susan Gray, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Samuel Henry Adams el 31 de enero de 1646, en Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1659, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Phillips Street Burying Ground, Charlestown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
